title: phagnalon tenorei proles annoticum
intro: Phagnalon tenorei proles annoticum, also known as Annotated Phagnalon or Small Cirsium, is a plant species belonging to the daisy family, Asteraceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to reduce inflammation and act as an antiseptic. The health benefits of Phagnalon tenorei proles annoticum include its potential to alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its use in treating wounds and skin irritations. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a tea or tincture, and in some cases, it is used in herbal infusions to support overall well-being.
